chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S- 105 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA 8817/2025. 2. For orders on MA 8818/2025. 21.10.2025. Mr. Sanaullah Khoso, Advocate for applicant / surety. Mr. Khalid Hussain Lakho, D.P.G for State. = 1. Urgency granted. 2. Through this application, applicant seeks release of surety furnished in the present matter. Counsel for the surety submits that vide Order dated 29.01.2024 the applicant/accused was granted ad-interim pre-arrest bail by this Court and the required surety was duly submitted by the present applicant/surety. Thereafter, on 03.05.2024 the instant bail application was allowed and the interim bail granted to the applicant/accused was confirmed on same terms and conditions, as such surety furnished before this Court is no more required. Learned D.P.G present in Court waives notice and after going through the record, tendered his no objection for release of surety. In view of above, listed application stands disposed of with direction to the office to release/return the surety to applicant/surety, however, after due verification and identification as per procedure. JUDGE Tufail
